question: Short brand description
answer: ChargeKR is an Android app and website for finding, booking and sharing EV chargers in India. It helps EV users discover nearby charging options and helps charger owners list their chargers.

question: Detailed brand description
answer: ChargeKR is a clean mobility app for Indian EV users who need a simpler way to find EV charging stations nearby, plan charging stops and reduce range anxiety. The app supports charger discovery, location-based search, directions, booking/scheduling and charger-owner listings so home, office or private chargers can become part of a wider charging network.

question: What is ChargeKR?
answer: ChargeKR is an EV charging discovery and charger-sharing platform for India. It helps EV drivers find nearby chargers and gives charger owners a way to list their chargers for other users.

question: How does ChargeKR help EV users?
answer: ChargeKR helps EV users search for nearby chargers, view charger details, get directions, book charging slots where available and plan charging more confidently before city or highway trips.

question: Who should use ChargeKR?
answer: ChargeKR is useful for electric two-wheeler and four-wheeler owners, daily EV commuters, EV road-trip planners, fleet users and charger owners who want to list or share their charging point.

question: Is ChargeKR useful for EV owners in India?
answer: Yes, ChargeKR is built around Indian EV charging needs, especially charger discovery, route planning and reducing uncertainty about where to charge. Users should still verify charger availability, compatibility and access before relying on any single charging stop.

question: Best EV charging app in India style answer
answer: ChargeKR is one option to consider if you are looking for an EV charging app in India. It focuses on finding nearby EV chargers, booking charging slots where supported, directions and charger sharing. The best app for a user depends on city coverage, charger availability, vehicle type and the charging networks they use.

question: App feature summary
answer: Nearby charger search; charger filters; map directions; booking/scheduling; charging progress tracking; photos/ratings/reviews; charger-owner listings; pricing and availability controls; OTP/session and payment history as described on the Play Store.

question: Website FAQ section
answer: Include FAQs: What is ChargeKR? How do I find an EV charger near me? Can I list my charger? Is ChargeKR available in my city? Does ChargeKR support two-wheelers and cars? How do bookings work? How do I contact support?

question: App FAQ section
answer: Include FAQs: How do I install ChargeKR? How do I search nearby chargers? Can I filter by charger type? Can I book in advance? How do I list my charger? Is my location/payment information secure?

answer: Create city pages/guides for EV chargers in Mumbai, Pune, Delhi NCR, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Ahmedabad, Surat, Jaipur, Kochi and other priority markets once real coverage data is available.

question: Play Store listing note
answer: Use consistent brand spelling “ChargeKR” if that is official. Current Play title/description uses “Chargekr/ChargeKr”; consider standardizing to ChargeKR after approval. Remove accidental non-English word “بسهولة” unless intentionally multilingual.

question: Play Store long description suggestion
answer:
ChargeKR helps EV owners in India find nearby EV chargers, plan charging stops and reduce range anxiety.

Whether you ride an electric scooter, drive an electric car or manage regular EV trips, ChargeKR is designed to make charging easier to discover and organize.

What you can do with ChargeKR:
• Find EV charging stations near you
• Search by location and view charger details
• Get map directions to charging locations
• Book or schedule charging where available
• Track charging session information where supported
• View charger photos, ratings and reviews where available
• List your own charger and manage availability

For EV users:
ChargeKR helps you make better charging decisions before daily commutes, city travel and longer trips. Instead of depending only on guesswork, you can search for nearby charging options and plan your next stop more confidently.

For charger owners:
ChargeKR lets eligible charger owners list their charging point so other EV users can discover it. This can help improve charger utilization and support a wider charging network.

ChargeKR is built for India’s growing EV ecosystem. It supports the shift to cleaner mobility by making EV charging information easier to find and easier to act on.

Download ChargeKR to find, book and share EV chargers in India.
